prepared_text:
Cochin Shipyard Limited 
Q1FY20 Earnings Call 
Invites to discuss the company’s Q1FY20 results and the road ahead 
Tuesday, 6th August, 2019 at 03:00 P.M. IST 
Cochin Shipyard Limited, a forerunner in the Indian Shipbuilding & Ship Repair 
industry, will organize a conference call for investors and analysts on Tuesday, 6th 
August, 2019 at 03:00 P.M. to discuss the company’s Q1FY20 financial 
performance. 
Mr. Madhu S Nair, Chairman & Managing Director, Mr. Jose V.J., Director 
(Finance), Mr. Rajesh Gopalakrishnan, General Manager (Business Development & 
New Projects) and Ms. Kala V, General Manager & Company Secretary will 
represent Cochin Shipyard Ltd. on the call.  
The financial results are available on the exchanges and corporate website - 
www.cochinshipyard.com  
 
DETAILS OF THE CONFERENCE CALL 
 
 
Timing 
03:00 P.M. IST on 6th August,2019 
Conference dial-in Primary number 
+91 22 6280 1341  
+91 22 7115 8242 
Local Access Number 
+91-7045671221  
Hong Kong Toll Free Number 
800964448 
Singapore  Toll Free Number 
8001012045 
UK Toll Free Number 
08081011573 
USA Toll Free Number 
 
18667462133  

About Cochin Shipyard Limited 
Cochin Shipyard Limited, incorporated in 1972, is a fully owned Government of India (GOI) 
company and has been rated excellent by GOI six times in a row for achieving the targets set for 
the yard under the MOU system. The company is a leading shipbuilding & repair yard in India, 
which has an infrastructure that combines economy, scale, and flexibility, and has ISO 9001 
accreditation. Cochin Shipyard Ltd commenced ship repair operations in the year 1978 and has 
undertaken repairs of all types of ships including up-gradation of ships of oil exploration 
industry as well as periodical layup repairs and life extension of ships of Navy, UTL, Coast Guard, 
Fisheries and Port Trust besides merchant ships of SCI & ONGC. It caters to clients engaged in the 
defense sector in India and commercial sector worldwide. Cochin Shipyard Ltd is the largest public 
sector shipyard in India in terms of dock capacity, as of March 31, 2015, according to the CRISIL Report. 
The company has also been conferred the 'Miniratna' status in 2008, by the Department of Public 
Enterprises, GOI. Cochin Shipyard has secured shipbuilding orders from internationally renowned 
companies from Europe & Middle East and is building  the country’s first indigenous Air Defense Ship. In 
addition to shipbuilding and ship repair, Cochin Shipyard Ltd also offers marine engineering training.   
 
 
For more information contact: 
 
     Kala V (CS)                                                                                                                  Gaurav Girdhar                                  
     Cochin Shipyard Ltd                                  
                                                       Concept Investor Relations           
     Tel: +91 (484) 2501306                                                                                                   Tel: +91 7798232425                                                
     Fax: +91 (484) 238400                                                                                                 Email: gaurav.g@conceptpr.com                            
     E-mail: kala.v@cochinshipyard.com                                                                                                                                                             
 
 
CIN:  U63032KL1972GOI002414 
Regd. Oﬃce: Administrative Building, Cochin Shipyard Premises, Perumanoor, Kochi - 682015 Kerala, India. 
Phone: +91 (484) 2501306; Fax No.: +91 (484) 2384001 
Email: secretary@cochinshipyard.com; Website: www.cochinshipyard.com
